# The Orchard at Dusk

- author: Avery Stone
- email: avery@example.com
- word-count: 72000

## Chapter One

The first line begins without indentation and carries a footnote marker.[^gate]

The second paragraph should be indented in manuscript mode.

> [poem]
> The gate remembers rain,
> and the names we leave behind.

```lyrics
Hold the wire, hold the line,
name the dusk and call it mine.
```

> [epigraph]
> Names are anchors for the living.
> -- Field Notes

---

[^gate]: In early drafts, the iron gate appears in three variants.
